revision.content:
This page exists to track permitted activities (by zoning) at the South Rogers South Walnut Bloominglabs property. It appears both the former South Rogers and South Walnut addresses have the same zoning. == Allowed activities == This was for the South Rogers location. Our landlord has stated that they are ok with us doing anything we need to our building to facilitate our use of it, as long as it's within code. == City Zoning == Map and definition, allowed activities: [[File:S.Rogers_zoning_permitted_uses.pdf]] Source of data:
* Zoning map: [http://bloomington.in.gov/documents/viewDocument.php?document_id=5518] * Zoning definitions (Industrial General): [https://bloomington.in.gov/media/media/application/pdf/86.pdf] [[Category:Operations]]
